mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (openid, name, phone, sex, id_number, avatar, create_time) VALUES (#{openid}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{sex}, #{idNumber}, #{avatar}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select daily.date as date, daily.newUserCount as newUserCount, (select count(*) from user u2 where u2.create_time < DATE_ADD(daily.date, INTERVAL 1 DAY)) as totalUserCount from (select DATE(u.create_time) as date, count(*) as newUserCount from user u where u.create_time >= #{begin} and u.create_time <= #{end} group by DATE(u.create_time)) daily order by daily.date
